der Zettel: A single, pristine, high-gloss enamel 3D note paper, gently curled at the edges, with a soft internal glow.
das Zeugnis: A stylized glossy 3D rolled diploma scroll, tied with a glowing ribbon and a prominent, shimmering seal.
(an-)/(aus)ziehen: A stylized glossy 3D shirt, translucent and shimmering, being gently pulled upwards by an unseen force, suggesting removal.
das Ziel: A stylized glossy 3D finish line banner, translucent and shimmering, with a glowing, triumphant arrow piercing its center.
der Zirkus: A vibrant, high-gloss enamel 3D circus tent, with glowing red and white stripes and a tiny, shimmering flag on top.
die Zitrone: A perfectly rendered, high-gloss 3D lemon with a single translucent water droplet glistening on its surface
der Zoo: A stylized, glossy miniature animal enclosure with cute, translucent 3D silhouettes of various animals peeking out
der Zucker: A shimmering pile of translucent, crystalline 3D sugar granules, catching light with a soft glow
zuerst: A glossy, stylized 3D starting block with a glowing, translucent arrow pointing forward, indicating the beginning
zuhören: A cute, stylized 3D toy character with exaggerated, glossy ears, leaning forward intently towards a glowing, translucent sound wave
zuletzt: A glossy, stylized 3D finish line banner with a glowing, translucent checkered pattern, marking the end
zumachen: A glossy, stylized 3D zipper pull smoothly closing two translucent panels together, creating a sealed seam
ändern: A glossy, translucent 3D cube smoothly morphing into a sphere, with a subtle internal glow indicating transformation
üben: A stylized, glossy 3D metronome ticking rhythmically next to a glowing, translucent musical note, emphasizing repetition
überall: A glossy, translucent 3D globe with numerous small, glowing, scattered points of light emanating from its surface
übermorgen: A glossy, translucent 3D calendar page showing two days ahead, with the 'day after tomorrow' date glowing brightly
übersetzen: A glossy, translucent 3D speech bubble smoothly transforming into another speech bubble containing a different, abstract symbol
die Übersetzung: Two distinct, stylized glossy 3D abstract symbols connected by a glowing, translucent bridge, representing semantic equivalence
